section_miscategorizations.text: He has had a baby with intestinal surgery at one month old and his grandmother had esophageal cancer.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are family history / family medical events rather than the patient's present illness narrative. While related risk context, they are not patient-reported symptoms or chronology of his own condition; they would more typically be documented in a separate history or objective/context section. However, their presence in HPI is common in practice and not seriously misleading.
